risks: large tracked evidence volume obscures implementation review
duplicated campaign readbacks increase validation and maintenance cost
externalization without digest and replay bindings would weaken auditability

proposed_catalog_record.public_fixture_policy: retain small canonical fixtures, schemas, readbacks, and safety assertions in Git
proposed_catalog_record.bulk_artifact_policy: move large historical campaign outputs to an operator-approved content-addressed catalog
proposed_catalog_record.deletion_policy: do not delete tracked evidence until catalog digest, retrieval, replay, and rollback readbacks pass
proposed_catalog_record.migration_policy: copy, verify, bind, then mark superseded; never silently rewrite evidence

staged_plan.gate: complete tracked path and digest inventory
publish catalog schema and golden-vector fixtures
Git and catalog readbacks agree on digest and schema
separate authorization for external storage or upload
only after replay and rollback evidence is complete
